title: Sweet Crumbly Algerian Apple Crumble
description: This weeknight dish combines sweet apples with a crumbly topping infused with cider for a delicious and easy-to-make dessert.

ingredients.name: 1 (400g) bag frozen mixed berries
ingredients.notes: Use any mix of blackberries, raspberries, and blueberries

ingredients.name: 2 large Granny Smith apples
ingredients.notes: Cubed and lightly baked with cinnamon

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup granulated sugar
ingredients.notes: Optional for added sweetness if needed

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup unsweetened applesauce
ingredients.notes: Added to the baking mixture for extra moisture

ingredients.name: 3/4 cup almond flour (or any gluten-free flour blend)
Pinch of salt
ingredients.notes: Enhances flavors in both apples and topping

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup granulated sugar (for topping)
ingredients.notes: Optional for added sweetness if needed

instructions: Core the apples and slice into bite-sized pieces.
Toss the apple slices with sugar, cinnamon, flour, all-purpose flour, lemon juice, and a pinch of salt. Mix well until evenly coated.
Transfer the baked apples to a greased 8x8 inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together almond flour, unsalted vegan butter (melted), granulated sugar, and salt for the crumble topping.
Sprinkle half of the crumble mixture over the top layer of baked apples and press gently with your fingers to create an even distribution. Repeat by sprinkling remaining crumbs evenly on top.
Bake in preheated oven for 25-30 minutes or until the top is golden brown and crisp.
Let cool for a few minutes before serving warm with any additional mixed berries if desired.
